result.answer: De acuerdo con los resultados obtenidos de la base de datos NVD/NIST, hay un total de 2745 vulnerabilidades asociadas a CWE-200 (Information Exposure).
result.sql:
SELECT COUNT(c.cve_id) AS total_vulnerabilities
FROM cve AS c
JOIN cve_cwe AS cw ON c.cve_id = cw.cve_id
WHERE cw.cwe_id = 'CWE-200';
